---
title: "MEGA-POLIS"
description: "A Free and Open Source Data-Driven Urban Design Toolkit for Sverchok"
repo-actions: false
code-annotations: hover
about:
  id: about
  template: jolla
  image: image4.png
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 5em
  links:
    - icon: download
      text: Download
      href: https://github.com/victorcalixto/mega-polis/archive/refs/heads/main.zip
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/victorcalixto/mega-polis
---
::: {#about}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}

::: {.column-page}

<center>A free and open source data-driven urban design toolkit. This is an add-on for [Blender](https://www.blender.org/)/[Sverchok](https://nortikin.github.io/sverchok/docs/main.html).</center>
